creator: des@flood.ping.uio.no
text:
Evren Yurtesen <yurtesen@ispro.net.tr> writes:
 > Whats the proper way of lefting out local entries for root? its not
 > mentioned in the man pages or anywhere...
 
 The point is that you should *not* leave out local root and wheel.
 Simplay add lines for root and wheel before the NIS lines in
 /etc/passwd and /etc/group (actually, unless you run a FreeBSD-only
 network, you should keep the stock /etc/passwd and /etc/group and just
 add NIS lines at the end of those files)
 
 DES
 -- 
 Dag-Erling Smorgrav - des@flood.ping.uio.no
